title: trifolium fragiferum subsp. bonannii
intro: Trifolium fragiferum subsp. bonannii is a lesser-known subspecies of the strawberry clover plant, a type of flowering legume native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Trifolium fragiferum subsp. bonannii include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
